name: shallowswe-calibration-v0.1
description: Versioned cheap candidate panel for ShallowSWE floor selection. Calibration runs are quarantined from published leaderboard results.

selection_policy.purpose: Select a primary floor-probe configuration by measured dynamic range across ShallowSWE tasks, then assign small/medium/large by floor pass-rate bands.
selection_policy.published_stats_policy: Calibration rollouts do not count as published leaderboard rollouts.
selection_policy.versioning_policy: Bump the calibration panel version when a candidate model disappears, pricing changes materially, or the selected floor saturates large tasks.
selection_policy.floor_selection_rule: Choose the pair with the widest pass-rate spread that is useful across the task set.

bands.small: selected floor one-shot pass rate 70-100% plus pinned ceiling gate >=75%
bands.medium: selected floor one-shot pass rate 30-70% plus pinned ceiling gate >=75%
bands.large: selected floor one-shot pass rate 0-40% plus pinned ceiling gate >=75%
